lede: A look at October 10 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Josh Giddey and Chiaki Kuriyama, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Ben Bernanke
events.desc: Ben S. Bernanke, Douglas W. Diamond and Philip H. Dybvig are jointly awarded the Nobel Memorial Prize in Economic Sciences.

events.title: Sheikh Muszaphar Shukor
events.desc: Sheikh Muszaphar Shukor becomes the first Malaysian in space on board Soyuz TMA-11.

events.title: Farabundo Martí National Liberation Front
events.desc: The Farabundo Martí National Liberation Front is founded in El Salvador.

events.title: Spiro Agnew
events.desc: U.S. Vice President Spiro Agnew resigns after being charged with evasion of federal income tax.

events.title: Outer Space Treaty
events.desc: The Outer Space Treaty comes into force.

events.title: Partial Nuclear Test Ban Treaty
events.desc: The Partial Nuclear Test Ban Treaty comes into effect.

events.title: Munich Agreement
events.desc: Abiding by the Munich Agreement, Czechoslovakia completes its withdrawal from the Sudetenland.

events.title: Wuchang Uprising
events.desc: The day after a bomb explodes prematurely, the Wuchang Uprising begins against the Chinese monarchy.

events.title: Ndyuka people
events.desc: In a treaty with the Dutch colonial authorities, the Ndyuka people of Suriname – descended from escaped slaves – gain territorial autonomy.

events.title: Kingdom of Ireland
events.desc: Over 600 Papal troops land in Ireland to support the Second Desmond Rebellion.

births.name: Yves Chauvin
births.line: French chemist and academic, Nobel Prize laureate (died 2015)

deaths.text: Erima Northcroft, New Zealand general, lawyer, and judge
Husayn ibn Ali, third Shia Imam and grandson of Muhammad
